self_hash_policy: DETACHED MANIFEST HASHING. Two files are intentionally NOT listed in files[]: (1) final_manifest.json — cannot hash itself; (2) manifest_hash.txt — contains the SHA-256 of final_manifest.json, written after this manifest is finalized. manifest_hash.txt is therefore the detached, externally-verifiable record of the manifest's integrity. The package_consistency_check.py verifies that manifest_hash.txt matches the actual SHA-256 of final_manifest.json (Step 11). Files removed from the package this pass: README.txt (README.md is canonical); grep_report.txt (superseded by stale_language_audit.txt).
